title: Registered Nurse/ Staff Nurse
description:
Purpose of the Job:

Operating under an integrated care setting, you play a pivotal role in providing primary nursing care and management to our clients. You will support clinical administrative duties and provide supervision, guidance, and direction to juniors to ensure that optimal care is provided to meet the desired positive client outcomes/experiences.

Key responsibility areas:

  • Develop care & health plans according to the assessed clients’ needs
  • Evaluate, monitor and document clients’ progress according to planned care
  • Ensure continuity of client care and treatment plans through follow-ups
  • Administer vaccinations and medications (when necessary)
  • Educate clients/ family members about preventive care, nutrition, fitness and hygiene.
  • Communicate clients’ progress with client/ & family.
  • Facilitate health related workshops (when necessary)
  • Collaborate with other healthcare professionals to provide comprehensive health care services.
  • Respond to health emergencies.
  • Advocate for health policies/ information that benefit the clients/community, i.e. Advanced care planning, dementia prevention, therapy education and rehabilitation techniques.
  • Supervise and guide nursing students and care assistants in their work.
  • Participate in clinical/service quality improvement and activities and provide suggestions to improve workflow.
  • Perform other duties as assigned by the Centre Manager/Management

Required qualifications and experience:

  • At least a Diploma in Nursing or Diploma in Health Sciences (Nursing).
  • Registered Nurse with the Singapore Nursing Board (SNB), current nursing licensure in the state of practice.
  • Minimum 2 years or above working experience with similar settings.


Required Competencies:

  • Able to converse in simple local languages and dialects.
  • Reliable team member, possess positive work and good interpersonal skills.
  • Ability to work independently and as part of a multidisciplinary team.
  • Compassionate, positive and possess a caring attitude towards clients.
  • Good team player, and be knowledgeable
  • Resourceful, systematic, and highly motivated.

postedCompany.description:
Society of Sheng Hong Welfare Services (SSHWS) was set up as the welfare arm of Lorong Koo Chye Sheng Hong Temple Association with the objective of carrying out relevant good work and welfare activities to relieve hardship as well as to bring benefits to the society and the community.


Membership to SSHWS is open to all of age 18 and above, sharing the same objectives irrespective of race, colour, creed, religion, language, sex and social status.


SSHWS is governed by a Management Committee whose members are elected according to the governing instrument, which is the Constitution. All our members serve on a voluntary basis without receiving any form of remuneration.


SSHWS holds the status of Institution of Public Character (IPC) since 3 November 2000. With the IPC status, all outright cash donations are tax deductible.
postedCompany.name: Society of Sheng Hong Welfare Services
